creator: brnrd@freebsd.org
text:
Hi Mokhi,

The MySQL release notes mention it now depends on Boost yet does not mention the version required (http://dev.mysql.com/doc/relnotes/mysql/5.7/en/news-5-7-5.html). Have you tested if it will build and run when you use the currently available 1.55 port? Boost contains the Geometry libs since 1.47 (http://www.boost.org/doc/libs/1_55_0/libs/geometry/doc/html/geometry/release_notes.html). MariaDB contains the same features it seems yet doesn't require a later Boost version (I have not tested this at runtime).

Regarding the porting issue for mysql57-server, what issue are you encountering? You're welcome to join us on IRC (#bsdports on EFnet or #freebsd-ports on Freenode) to discuss. We're there to help!

Thanks for all the work!

Bernard.
